data.name: 拘束戰鬥色情RPG - 命運的厄爾庇斯 -
data.detailed_description:
◼︎ 緊身衣與戰鬥色情束縛!

身穿緊身衣的女主角小惠，將在戰鬥中被各種裝置束縛，遭受色色的玩具和性騷擾攻擊所凌辱！
這是以立繪色色為主的戰鬥色情RPG。　
※遊戲中沒有（幾乎沒有）所謂的與竿役進行的正戲。
基本上幾乎都是在戰鬥中以立繪演出色情場面。
 

◼︎ 所有敵方角色都會使用束縛攻擊！

敵人會使出各種束縛用具以及束縛方式，試圖讓小惠屈服！
如果維持束縛狀態不掙脫，就會遭到按摩棒和觸手玩弄！
（頭目的凌辱更加激烈！！）
 

◼︎ 多采多姿的戰鬥色情狀態！

多樣化的敵方角色，都會使用不同的束縛方法。
因此也準備了各種不堪的敗北方式。
 

◼︎ 關卡介紹

遊戲主要以３道關卡構成：
・有哥布林等奇幻風格（？）敵人登場的森林關卡
・女幹部系研究員的機械怪物橫行的地城關卡
・觸手蜿蜒蠕動的肉壁關卡
 

◼︎ 在束縛狀態下進行逃脫遊戲

在某些事件中也有逃脫遊戲橋段，必須在束縛狀態下穿過色情陷阱想辦法逃出生天。
 

◼︎ 其他

全關卡通關的預計遊玩時間：最長約兩個小時。
使用RPG製作大師MV製作。

data.short_description: 身穿緊身衣的女主角小惠，將在戰鬥中被各種裝置束縛，遭受色色的玩具和性騷擾攻擊所凌辱！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Restraint combat erotic RPG Elpis Aigis
data.detailed_description:
◼︎ Bodysuit and combat erotic restraint!

The protagonist, Megu, wearing a sexy bodysuit, will encounter various kinds of bondage devices in combat and be humiliated by erotic toys and sexually harassing attacks!
The main theme of this erotic combat RPG is lewd character illustrations.
※There is (hardly) any sex performed with male characters in this game.
It's mostly erotic combat scenes presented with character illustrations.
 

◼︎ All enemies use bondage attack!

The enemies will use all kinds of restraint devices and methods to try to make Megu submit!
If Megu doesn't break free from the restraints, she will be humiliated by dildos and tentacles!
(The humiliation from Bosses is even more intense!!)
 

◼︎ Abundant combat erotic status!

Rich enemy types, each having a unique moveset
Various embarrassing defeat scenes
 

◼︎ Stage Introduction

This game is made of three stages:
・The Forest stage, featuring Goblins and other fantasy(?) enemies
・The Dungeon stage, featuring machinal monsters
・The Flesh stage, featuring squirming tentacles
 

◼︎ Escape in restraint

In some events, there is an escape phase. Megu must escape from erotic traps while being in restraint.
 

◼︎ Others

Estimated clear time: About two hours at most.
Made with RPG maker MV.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
